functions.title: Guide Book #90
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #90§r
§lNether Wisp§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Wisp, Fire-elemental, Spirit, Aerial.
•§lSpawns in§r: All nether biomes.
•§lHealth§r: 12
•§lFly speed§r: 0.15

•§lImmune to§r: Physical Damage, Fire.
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Lava.
•§lTempted by§r: Fire Feather
•§lPossible drops§r: Blaze Powder, XP Orbs.
•Can be magical charged.
•Can be interacted with a §lFire Feather§r to turn it

into §lBlaze Powder§r.
•Charged Nether Wisp can produce a §lFire Resistance Potion§r, when interacted with using a §lGlass Bottle§r.
•Uncharged Nether Wisp will become charged again after 5 minutes.
•It takes damage when in contact with water

or when it rains.
•Can transform into a §lNether Soul Wisp§r when interacting with Soul Fire, Soul Sand, or a Soul Campfire.
